login.title: Moodly
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.welcomeMessage: We're here to help you notice patterns and track how you feel — at your own pace, without judgement.
login.disclaimer: Moodly is a self-assessment and wellness tracking tool, not a medical device. It does not diagnose, treat, or prevent any condition. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for mental health concerns.
login.privacyNotice: Your data stays on your device. We do not store your test results, entries, or personal information on our servers.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noEntries: No entries yet — start when you feel ready. Every small step helps.
dashboard.noTrendData: No entries yet — your data will appear here once you start tracking.
dashboard.noTestData: No test results yet — take your first test when you feel ready.
dashboard.recentEntry: You already logged this parameter {{minutes}} min ago
dashboard.recentEntry_1: You already logged this parameter 1 min ago

onboarding.welcomeDesc: We're here to help you notice patterns in how you feel — so you can understand yourself better and have more meaningful conversations with your therapist.
onboarding.startDesc: There's no pressure to do everything at once. You can explore at your own pace and come back anytime.
onboarding.chooseTitle: What would you like to do?

testDetail.reviewDesc: Tap any question to change your answer
testDetail.exitConfirmDesc: You can always come back and continue where you left off.

testResults.title: Test Results
testResults.noResults: No results yet — take your first test when you feel ready.
testResults.disclaimer: This test is an educational self-assessment tool. It is not a medical diagnosis and does not replace professional evaluation. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for mental health concerns.

reports.title: Reports
reports.noReports: No exports yet — your data is ready when you are.

breathing.title: Breathing Exercise
breathing.subtitle: Calm your anxiety creature with deep breathing
breathing.description: The 4-7-8 breathing technique helps activate your parasympathetic nervous system, reducing stress and anxiety. Complete 4 cycles to see your creature calm down.
breathing.sessionComplete: You breathed for {{duration}} seconds. Your creature feels calmer.
breathing.step1: Press Start and follow the breathing circle
breathing.step2: Inhale as the circle expands (4 seconds)
breathing.step3: Hold your breath while the circle pauses (7 seconds)
breathing.step4: Exhale slowly as the circle contracts (8 seconds)

crisis.bodyUrgent: Your responses indicate you may be having thoughts of self-harm. Please reach out to a crisis helpline right now.
crisis.bodyCritical: Your responses indicate a plan for self-harm. Emergency intervention is needed immediately.

contentWarning.title: The following questions may be difficult
contentWarning.body: These questions help us better understand your situation. If you are in crisis, please contact a helpline before proceeding.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.sent: If this email is registered, a reset link has been sent.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.tooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
